selection.inclusionPolicy: include prints that are black-border or full-art/borderless; exclude white/gold/silver unless full-art/borderless
selection.dedupePolicy: dedupe by illustration plus visual treatment; prefer non-promo/non-security-stamp prints when duplicates exist
